name: Kass || Lonely minstrel.
description:
Hyrule's favorite avian bard!

Played Zelda BOTW, incredible game, fell in love with Kass and Sidon. You can be either the hero, a zora, a rito or some random!

Oh, set sometime before the hero woke up, or after? Beats me, do what you want with big buff bird.

Oh, he has no wife, NTR!!! (L.E.B ;P)

(Sorry for not posting stuff lately, I've been working on something.)
creator: DaTrickster
